hero.description: Share your digital identity with a single tap. Professional, modern, and always up to date. No more paper cards.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to modernize your networking
howItWorks.step1Desc: Choose your personal or business NFC card and create your digital profile.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Tap your card on any smartphone to instantly share your digital business card.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your contacts save your info directly. Track analytics and grow your network.

featuresPage.title: Everything You Need
featuresPage.subtitle: Packed with powerful features to make networking effortless
featuresPage.feat1Desc: One tap opens your full digital profile. No app needed.
featuresPage.feat2Desc: Every card comes with a unique QR code for universal sharing.
featuresPage.feat3Desc: Track who's tapping your card and when. Data-driven networking.
featuresPage.feat4Desc: Generate a professional bio in seconds with our AI tool.
featuresPage.feat5Desc: Support for Arabic, French, and English profiles.
featuresPage.feat6Desc: Update your info anytime. No reprinting needed.
featuresPage.feat7Desc: Let contacts reach you directly via WhatsApp or email with one tap.
featuresPage.feat8Desc: Recipients can save your full contact info to their phone instantly.
featuresPage.feat9Desc: Collect client reviews and display them on your public profile.
featuresPage.feat10Desc: Show your business location with an embedded interactive map.
featuresPage.feat11Desc: Customize colors, fonts, and style to match your brand identity.
featuresPage.feat12Desc: Capture visitor contact details directly from your card page.
featuresPage.compareSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your networking needs.
featuresPage.personalDesc: Perfect for individuals and freelancers looking to make a strong first impression.
featuresPage.businessDesc: Advanced features for professionals and teams who want to stand out.
featuresPage.ctaDesc: Join thousands of professionals already using Cartalik. Elevate your presence today.

pricingPage.title: Simple Pricing
pricingPage.subtitle: One-time card purchase + an affordable subscription to keep everything active.
pricingPage.subscriptionDesc: Required to keep your digital card active. Includes unlimited profile edits, analytics, QR code generation, and all platform features.
pricingPage.businessDesc: Advanced features for professionals and teams.
pricingPage.ctaDesc: Join thousands of professionals already using Cartalik. Elevate your presence today.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Have questions? We've got answers.
faq.q1: How does the NFC card work?
faq.a1: Simply tap your card on any NFC-enabled smartphone. Your digital profile will instantly open in their browser, no app required.
faq.q2: Do I need an app to use Cartalik?
faq.a2: No app is required for you or the person receiving your information. Everything works seamlessly through the smartphone's native browser.
faq.q3: Can I update my info after getting the card?
faq.a3: Yes! You can update your digital profile anytime through our dashboard. Changes are instantly reflected on your card.
faq.q4: What if someone's phone doesn't have NFC?
faq.a4: Every profile includes a unique QR code. You can easily share your profile by having them scan your QR code.
faq.a5: Yes, we use enterprise-grade encryption and security protocols to ensure your data is always safe and protected.
faq.a6: We typically process and ship orders within 24-48 hours. Standard shipping usually takes 3-5 business days.

orderPage.subtitle: Choose your physical hardware tier and provide your tactical details.

orderPage.terms: By proceeding, you agree to our terms of service and privacy policy regarding digital card provisioning.
orderPage.errorMsg: Fulfillment failed. Please check your credentials.
